---
title: "Sutskever at NeurIPS 2024: Pre-Training Era Is Over"
description: "Ilya Sutskever's Test of Time award talk at NeurIPS 2024 — pre-training is over, next up is agents/synthetic data/inference-time compute, and reasoning is unpredictable."
author: "synesis"
date: "2024-12-13"
categories: [AI, generative AI, LLMs, NLP, reasoning, conference, video, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Ilya Sutskever's Test of Time talk at NeurIPS 2024. [Watch on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WQQdd6qGxNs)](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Ilya Sutskever's Test of Time award talk at NeurIPS 2024. The main points:

* Pre-training era is over because data (internet) is exhausted.

* Next up: agents, synthetic data, inference time compute (among other things).

* Reasoning is unpredictable.

For the last point it's also the nature of discrete math problems: they scale poorly due to their combinatorial nature. Solving them often requires different strategies.

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WQQdd6qGxNs>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_ilya-sutskever-sequence-to-sequence-learning-activity-7273587734223425536-3ROz).*
